sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَحْسَنَ النَّاسِ خُلُقًا، وَقَدْ خَدَمَهُ أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ فَمَا قَالَ لَهُ «أُفٍّ» قَطُّ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, imao je najljepšu narav, a Anas ibn Malik ga je služio deset godina i nikada mu nije rekao ni 'uh' [Muslim, Knjiga o vrlinama, br.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) had the best character, and Anas ibn Malik served him for ten years, yet he never even said 'uff' to him [Muslim, Book of Virtues, No.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّعَامُلُ الرَّقِيقُ يُبَيِّنُ لَنَا أَهَمِّيَّةَ الرَّحْمَةِ وَالصَّبْرِ فِي التَّرْبِيَةِ وَالدَّعْوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj blag odnos nam pokazuje važnost milosti i strpljenja u odgoju i pozivanju u vjeru.
sentences.translationEn: This gentle treatment shows us the importance of mercy and patience in upbringing and Da'wah.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ أَنَّ حُسْنَ الْخُلُقِ رُكْنٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ فِي الْإِيمَانِ، وَلَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ سُلُوكٍ اجْتِمَاعِيٍّ عَابِرٍ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Baz objašnjava da je lijepo ponašanje osnovni stub vjerovanja, a ne samo prolazno društveno ponašanje.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Baz explains that good character is a fundamental pillar of faith, not just a passing social behavior.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّوَاضُعَ مَعَ الضُّعَفَاءِ وَالصِّغَارِ يَرْفَعُ قَدْرَ الْمُؤْمِنِ عِنْدَ خَالِقِهِ وَيُحَبِّبُهُ إِلَى خَلْقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Poniznost prema slabima i mlađima uzdiže stepen vjernika kod njegovog Stvoritelja i čini ga voljenim među stvorenjima.
sentences.translationEn: Humility with the weak and the young raises the believer's status with his Creator and endears him to His creation.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَنْبَغِي لَنَا الِاقْتِدَاءُ بِالسِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ فِي ضَبْطِ النَّفْسِ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ وَتَجَنُّبِ اللَّوْمِ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: Stoga bismo se trebali ugledati na Poslanikov životopis u kontroli bijesa i izbjegavanju neprestanog prigovaranja.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we should emulate the Prophetic biography in self-control during anger and avoiding constant blaming.

sentences.arabic: فَالْإِسْلَامُ دِينُ الرَّحْمَةِ، وَالْمُؤْمِنُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يَأْمَنُ النَّاسُ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Islam je vjera milosti, a pravi vjernik je onaj od čijeg su jezika i ruku sigurni drugi ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: Islam is a religion of mercy, and the true believer is the one from whose tongue and hand people are safe.
